name: Employee Offboarding Agent
description: Automates the employee offboarding lifecycle — from resignation processing and notice period calculation to asset return tracking, exit interviews, knowledge transfer, access revocation, and final settlement.

skills.name: initiate_offboarding
skills.description: Register a resignation, calculate notice period and shortfall, and set up asset tracking

skills.name: send_exit_notification
skills.description: Send the departing employee an exit notification email with timeline and checklist

skills.name: track_assets
skills.description: Check the return status of all company assets (laptop, ID card, access card, etc.)

skills.name: update_asset_status
skills.description: Mark a specific company asset as returned or lost

skills.name: schedule_exit_interview
skills.description: Schedule a confidential exit interview and notify both parties

skills.name: revoke_access
skills.description: Flag all system access for revocation and notify IT/HR

skills.name: assign_knowledge_transfer
skills.description: Assign a knowledge transfer handover to a successor with deadline

skills.name: notify_hr_final_settlement
skills.description: Notify HR to process final settlement including notice shortfall and asset deductions

skills.name: get_offboarding_status
skills.description: Get a comprehensive summary of the offboarding case
